SECURITY: if this involves API keys, the Keychain, or unexpected network
requests, do NOT file it here. Report it privately - see SECURITY.md.
-->

A clear description of the bug.

## What you expected

What you expected to happen instead.

## Steps to reproduce

1.
2.
3.

## Capture input (if relevant)

If this is about capture/extraction, paste the exact text you typed and what
tasks/notes it produced vs. what you expected. Redact anything private.

```
(your capture text here)
```

## Environment

- Jotty version / commit:
- macOS version (must be 26.0+):
- Xcode version (if building from source):
- AI provider selected (Apple FM / Ollama / Claude / OpenAI / Gemini):
- Storage folder is default (`~/Documents/Jotty/`) or custom:

## Logs / screenshots

Attach any relevant screenshots. For AI/Ollama issues, the daemon log at
`~/Library/Application Support/Jotty/ollama/daemon.log` may help. Redact any
secrets or private note content before pasting.
